tools.name: entities.kgsearchEntitiesSearch
tools.description: Searches Knowledge Graph for entities that match the constraints. A list of matched entities will be returned in response, which will be in JSON-LD format and compatible with http://schema.org

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
